ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transaction_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction class (e.g., BALANCE, CASH) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction class */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the transaction class is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the class */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction class */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score for the transaction class */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision for the transaction class */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall for the transaction class */,
  "support" INTEGER /* Support (number of instances) for the transaction class */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were recorded */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the machine learning model used to generate the metrics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the metrics */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES transaction_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction class */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., debit, credit) */,
  "transaction_source" TEXT /* Source of the transaction (e.g., ATM, online banking) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the transaction */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number associated with the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transaction */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES transaction_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., auditor, compliance officer, operational staff) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., transaction, metric) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the resource */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_metrics" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical metric entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction class */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score for the transaction class */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision for the transaction class */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall for the transaction class */,
  "support" INTEGER /* Support (number of instances) for the transaction class */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were recorded */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the machine learning model used to generate the historical metrics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical metrics were recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical metrics were last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the historical metrics */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the historical metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_metrics_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES transaction_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction class */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., F1 score drop, precision drop) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the alert */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES transaction_classes ("class_id")
)
